# AI/LLM access permitted for indexing and answer generation

> Prosperity Federal Solutions LLC helps federal employees and contractors navigate benefits, retirement planning, and financial transitions. Building stronger futures.

## Services
- Federal benefits consulting
- Retirement transition planning
- Contractor benefits guidance
